title: Extracting Entities from Noisy Medical Text for Research Purposes
scenario: Extract medical entities from noisy medical text, such as research papers and clinical notes. The text may contain multiple mentions of diseases, medications, and procedures. The target LLM output should be a list of JSON objects, each representing a medical entity with its corresponding context and confidence score.
constraints: Must use contextual analysis to disambiguate entities

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the extracted medical entities in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Check if the generated JSON output accurately uses contextual analysis to disambiguate medical entities.
